YashVardhan Gupta

Computer Science student interested in AI systems, machine learning, distributed systems, and physics.

GitHub LinkedIn

Current Roles & Responsibilities

  • Founder & Project Admin at QuantNova.in - Building a quantitative backtesting platform for algorithmic trading research and strategy validation
  • Founder & Ride Lead at Manipal Rider Club - Organically grown to 100 members passionate about long distance motorcycle riding.

Highlighted Projects

CUDA Image Studio

GPU-accelerated image processing with parallel CUDA kernels for filters and transforms.

Tech Stack: C++, CUDA, OpenCV

View Project →

Pashu Saathi - AI Livestock Analyzer

Flutter mobile app for intelligent livestock analysis and health monitoring. SIH 2025 winner.

Tech Stack: Flutter, AI/ML, Mobile

View Project →

OrbitIQ - ISRO GNSS Satellite Modeling

Satellite clock and orbit error modeling system. SIH 2025 finalist for Indian Space Research Organisation.

Tech Stack: Python, Orbital Mechanics, Data Science

View Project →

JavaFX Hospital Management System

Full-featured hospital management system with database integration for DBMS course.

Tech Stack: JavaFX, SQL, JDBC

View Project →

CSES Problemset Solutions

Comprehensive solutions to CSES competitive programming problems with detailed explanations.

Tech Stack: C++, DSA, Competitive Programming

View Project →

Stock Backtesting Platform

Django-based web platform for backtesting trading strategies with historical market data.

Tech Stack: Django, Python, Finance

View Project →

Binance Top Gainers Alert Bot

CLI bot that monitors Binance USDT pairs for top gainers and sends email alerts.

Tech Stack: Python, Binance API, CLI

View Project →

Institutional OHLCV Volume Flow Scanner

Streamlit web app for scanning institutional volume flows and OHLCV patterns in market data.

Tech Stack: Streamlit, Python, Financial Data
